hero.title: The point of sale that fits
hero.description: From corner kiosks to coffee shops, restaurants and laundries — AmanaPOS handles the till, inventory, staff and reports on a single phone. No bulky terminal, no contracts.

features.title: Everything a small shop needs. Nothing it doesn't.
features.subtitle: One app for the till, the inventory, the staff and the numbers — designed for the realities of running a shop in Sudan.

items.title: Lightning checkout
items.description: Tap, ring up, charge. Built for one-handed use on a phone, just as fast on tablet.

items.title: Inventory that keeps up
items.description: Real-time stock, low-stock alerts, multi-location transfers and barcode-friendly SKUs.

items.title: Reports you actually read
items.description: Daily takings, top sellers, peak hours, tax — on a single screen, exportable to PDF.

items.title: Staff & permissions
items.description: Managers and cashiers, PIN logins, shift drawers and role-based access on every action.

items.title: Works offline
items.description: Power cuts and patchy networks are a feature, not a bug. Sales sync when you reconnect.

items.title: SDG & VAT native
items.description: Sudanese pound formatting, 10% VAT baked in. Receipts that look right on the first try.

howItWorks.title: Up and running today, not next week.
howItWorks.subtitle: No installations, no servers. Open the app and start selling.

steps.title: Sign up in 2 minutes
steps.description: Phone, OTP, business name. That's it — no paperwork, no salesperson.

steps.title: Add your products
steps.description: Type a few items or import a list. Categories, prices, stock — done in one screen.

steps.title: Start selling today
steps.description: Hand a phone to your cashier. Sales, receipts and reports are already running.

pricing.title: One plan per stage. Upgrade only when you grow.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no transaction cuts. Cancel any time.

plans.name: Starter
plans.blurb: Everything you need to start selling today.

plans.name: Business
plans.blurb: For growing shops that need more horsepower.

plans.name: Multi-store
plans.blurb: For chains with multiple branches and devices.

download.title: Download AmanaPOS today. Sell tomorrow.
download.subtitle: Available on iPhone and Android. Free to start, no card required.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The link you followed doesn't exist or has been moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We hit an unexpected problem. Try again or head back home.

footer.tagline: The point of sale built for Sudanese merchants. Sell anywhere — phone, tablet, counter.
